name: Iran
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **IRANIAN STATE MESSAGING REVERSE-CYCLED MAY 5: ESCALATING-DEFIANT → DIPLOMATIC-FORWARD-WITH-HARDLINER-DISSENT.** After Trump's May 5 pause of Project Freedom, FM Abbas Araghchi reframed the now-paused operation as 'Project Deadlock' while signaling the Pakistan track is alive ('there's no military solution to a political crisis') — language that READS as diplomatic-track validation rather than escalation. IRNA dropped May 4 'delirium' framing and pivoted to acknowledging the Pakistan track. Tasnim/IRGC track maintained UAE pressure ('all UAE interests' as targets) but did NOT escalate vs the US after the pause. INTERNAL POSTURE DIVERGENCE confirmed: Pezeshkian/Araghchi civilian government on negotiating track vs IRGC/hardliner outlets (Kayhan column threatening European military bases as 'legitimate and lawful targets') maintaining leverage rhetoric — factional bifurcation is structural intelligence, NOT a unified shift. Kinetic restart of May 4 (multi-axis attack on US Navy + UAE Fujairah + SK HMM Namu) was effective LEVERAGE that produced the diplomatic-track re-opening within 24 hours. UAE air-defense engaged 12 ballistic + 3 cruise + 4 drones (refined breakdown vs yesterday's 15+4); 18 of 19 successfully neutralized — Iran demonstrated coordinated saturation strike capability but achieved one drone breakthrough (Fujairah). Rial flat ~1.81-1.85M IRR/USD; hyperinflation 2M trigger NOT activated. Mojtaba Day 59-60 absent (still no proof-of-life). Branches re-priced: kinetic ~25-30% (DOWN from 40-45%); extended-economic-warfare ~35-40%; negotiated-resolution ~30-35% (UP from 15-20%). Markets adjudicated the diplomatic re-pricing: Brent -4% May 5 → $107.96 May 6; VIX -5% to 17.38 (below pre-May 4); USD/INR pulled back to ₹95.13.

active_triggers.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei appears on video/audio (proof of life and command)

Iran's missile stockpile depleted to point of inability to sustain retaliation
Iran accepts direct talks with US (publicly acknowledged)
Iran retaliatory strike for Tangsiri assassination
